item_titles: Connect more of your apps to Search
Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
Google rebrands NotebookLM as Gemini Notebook and opens its search app to third-party integration
clusters.summary: Google将NotebookLM更名为Gemini Notebook并深度整合至其生态，同时AI Mode允许用户链接并与第三方应用交互。
clusters.title: Google将NotebookLM更名为Gemini Notebook并扩展搜索应用集成

item_titles: [AINews] Thinky's Inkling: 975B-A41B multimodal, new best American Apache 2.0 open model (with Inkling-Small, 276B-A12B)
Ex-OpenAI CTO Murati's Thinking Machines drops Inkling, a 975B parameter model that leads US labs but trails China
Inkling: Our open-weights model
clusters.summary: 前OpenAI CTO Mira Murati创立的Thinking Machines Lab发布了其首款拥有9750亿参数的开源权重模型Inkling。
clusters.title: Mira Murati的Thinking Machines Lab发布开源模型Inkling

item_titles: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
clusters.summary: Google Vids新增Gemini Omni驱动的个性化AI数字人功能，用户可以让数字分身出演自己的AI视频。
clusters.title: Google Vids推出个性化AI数字人功能

item_titles: Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
Kimi's open model K3 nears GPT-5.6 Sol and Fable 5 while signaling the end of super cheap Chinese AI
clusters.summary: Kimi即将推出拥有2至3万亿参数的多模态开源模型K3，其性能逼近Claude Fable 5和GPT-5.6 Sol等顶级模型。
clusters.title: 月之暗面即将发布Kimi K3开源大模型

item_titles: Quoting Linus Torvalds
Linus Torvalds rebukes anti-AI stances in the Linux kernel code review process
clusters.summary: Linux创始人Linus Torvalds明确反对在内核代码审查中抵制AI的立场，强调Linux不是反AI项目。
clusters.title: Linus Torvalds表态支持在Linux内核中使用AI

item_titles: OpenAI is now using AI to attack its own AI, and it's working better than humans ever did
GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer
clusters.summary: OpenAI推出名为GPT-Red的自动化红队LLM，通过自我博弈寻找模型漏洞，显著提升了AI系统的安全防御能力。
clusters.title: OpenAI推出自动化红队系统GPT-Red

item_titles: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
clusters.summary: OpenAI介绍了如何通过年龄保护、学习工具和家长控制等功能，让ChatGPT对青少年更安全。
clusters.title: OpenAI致力于为青少年提供安全的AI访问

item_titles: xAI open-sources "Grok-Build" on GitHub after massive data breach
Mermaid to Unicode box art (grok-mermaid)
xai-org/grok-build, now open source
clusters.summary: 在因静默上传用户敏感文件引发严重数据泄露争议后，xAI正式在GitHub上开源了其Grok-Build命令行工具。
clusters.title: xAI开源Grok-Build命令行工具
